title.en: It didn't take long for the news of the return ...

content.en:
The Ten Elements Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, and the Realm Ancestor pondered for a long time, and most of them wanted to go to the Eternal Ruins.

However, after talking to the Primal Ancestor, they knew that it would not work if they simply sent a will clone over.

Because the distance between the will clone and the ontology must not be too far away, the reason why those eternal masters of the Origin Realm Sea can let the will clone roam the end of the realm is because they have a limited number of places to go, so they don't need to worry about the distance between the will clone and the ontology.

However, the ruins of eternity are too far away, and if you let the will clone go, I am afraid that the will clone will collapse before reaching the ruins of eternity.

In short, the Primal Ancestor tried to get the will clone back, but the will clone collapsed on the way.

Therefore, if they want to go to the Ruins of Eternity, they must go to the Ruins of Eternity in their true bodies.

......

It didn't take long for the news of the return of the Primal Ancestor to spread.

"The Primordial Ancestor is back?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This one has been gone for too long, and even many people feel that the Primordial Ancestor is either lost in the depths of the realm forever, or has already fallen.

In short, the possibility of the Primal Ancestor coming back is very low.

Unexpectedly, the Taichu Ancestor is back now, which is beyond everyone's expectations.

And not long after, the Ten Elements Ancestor asked Ye Tian to go to Wanyuan Mountain again.

Not only Ye Tian, but also several of Ye Tian's senior brothers and Senior Sister Xue Nu also came, as well as many official disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor, all of whom came to Wanyuan Mountain.

Obviously, there is a big announcement this time, otherwise all disciples above the official disciple level would not be allowed to come here.

When all the disciples had arrived, the Ten Elements Ancestor announced.

"Soon, Wanyuan Mountain will be completely closed!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor announced.

"What?"

All the disciples were stunned, Wanyuan Mountain was completely closed, what was the situation?

The Ten Elements Ancestor continued: "I called you here this time, firstly, to announce this matter, and secondly, to give each of you one last chance!"

"Master, why do you suddenly want to close Wanyuan Mountain?"

A formal disciple wondered.

"You'll find out later!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor obviously didn't want to say it, so many disciples stopped asking.

Subsequently.

The Ten Elements Ancestor gave the next opportunity, and every disciple had it.

And Jiang You's controller, the ancient demon master, the black decay controller, and the Snow Maiden controller also got a chance, only Ye Tian didn't get a chance.

After all, Ye Tian's strength is on par with the Ten Elements Ancestor, and the Ten Elements Ancestor can't give any chance, if it is given a very ordinary chance, it will not be good.

Subsequently.

The Ten Elements Ancestor let those formal disciples leave, leaving only a few of Ye Tian's personal disciples.

"You should be very curious about why the teacher completely closed Wanyuan Mountain, right?"

"Curious indeed!"

The Black Rotten Ruler said.

The Ten Elements Ancestor continued: "Prepare for the Master to leave the Origin Realm Sea and follow the Primal Ancestor to another heaven and earth. "

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he asked, "Could it be a heaven and earth similar to the Origin Realm Sea?"

"Not bad!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded and said, "The place where the master is going is called the Eternal Ruins, the Eternal Ruins are far more powerful than the Origin Realm Sea, and there are even strong people there who surpass the Ten Realm-level controllers, but it is not a half-step transcendence for the teacher, but a real transcendence." "

Ye Tian was a little curious about the realm above the Ten Realms-level masters, and asked, "Master, what is the name of the realm above the Ten Realms-level masters?"

"The Perfect Master!"

Ten Xingzu said.

"The perfect master, sure enough!"

Ever since Ye Tian knew that there was a perfect-level ancestral endowment above the ancestral endowment, he had been thinking about whether the higher realm would have something to do with the word perfect, and now it seems that this is indeed the case.

"How powerful a perfect controller should be!"

The Black Ruler is full of anticipation and longing.

The Ten Elements Ancestor said again: "The Master wants to go to the Eternal Ruins to find a breakthrough path for the Perfect Controller, and the Master is not able to enter the Origin Realm Sea now, so he is not going to continue to stay here, and will follow the Primordial Ancestor in the near future." "

"Master, I want to go too!" said the Black Decay Master.

"Yes!" Ten Elements Ancestor nodded, "Black Decay, you can follow the master over, but once you go, you must also go to the main body, because it is too far away from the Origin Realm Sea, and the will clone can't reach there at all." "

The Black Decay Controller immediately said, "Master, the disciple knows, I am willing to go with the body!"

Jiang You, the Snow Maiden, and the ancient demon controllers have no idea of going to the Eternal Ruins for the time being, after all, their strength is too weak, and if they go to the Eternal Ruins, even the master will not be able to protect them.

After all, there must be many existences there that are stronger than Shizun, so it is better for them to stay in the Origin Realm Sea and practice silently, and wait for the day when their strength cannot progress anymore, or if their strength is strong enough to a certain extent, it is not too late to go to the Origin Realm Sea.

"Ye Tian, are you going to the Eternal Ruins?"

Ten Elements Ancestor asked.

"Naturally, I'm going!"

Ye Tian immediately said.

A place like the Ruins of Eternity is not much more powerful than the Origin Realm Sea, and there is even the existence of a perfect controller, if you go to the Ruins of Eternity, it is naturally easier to impact the perfect master.

If he stayed in the Origin Realm Sea, although he still had the hope of becoming a perfect controller, he was prone to follow the wrong path, and his cultivation speed was far inferior to that of cultivating in the Eternal Ruins.

Of course, he doesn't need the body to go, he just needs to copy the body.

After all.

His copy body is not a will clone, the copy body is also similar to the main body, plus the copy talent is now promoted, even if he goes to the eternal ruins, he can make the two bodies link.

"Then it's decided, as a teacher, Ye Tian, Black Decay, the three of us will go to the Eternal Ruins together. Ten Xingzu said.

On the other side, the Primordial Ancestor, the Realm Ancestor, the Selfless True Ancestor and other great beings were also informing their respective disciples and relatives that they were also preparing to go to the Eternal Ruins.

Time passed slowly, and gradually, the countless Eternal Masters of the Origin Realm Sea knew that the Great Beings and some of the Ten Realm-level Masters were about to leave the Origin Realm Sea.

Suddenly, they knew that the next Origin Realm Sea might usher in a new era, and the power structure would undergo certain changes.

Finally this day.

The Primal Ancestor informed the Ten Elements Ancestor that it was time to set off for the Eternal Ruins.

If you don't go now, you'll go alone in the future.

And if you go alone, if your strength is not good, it is also very dangerous, and on the way to the Eternal Ruins, there are also many dangers, without the strength of a half-step perfect controller, you will fall if you are not careful.

Whoa!!

At the end of the world, the Taichu Ancestor, the Ten Elements Ancestor and others gathered together one by one.

They're about to go!
